content:
# elizaos-plugins/plugin-discord Daily Update (May 2, 2026)

## OVERVIEW 
Development on May 2, 2026, focused on addressing configuration inconsistencies regarding environment variables. Work was initiated to ensure the `DISCORD_AUTO_REPLY` setting is handled uniformly across the codebase.

## KEY TECHNICAL DEVELOPMENTS
*No completed work was recorded for this date.*

## NEWLY OPENED PULL REQUESTS
*   [#50](https://github.com/elizaos-plugins/plugin-discord/pull/50) fix(env): A new pull request was opened to ensure the `DISCORD_AUTO_REPLY` environment variable is correctly respected via `DISCORD_DEFAULTS`.

## CLOSED ISSUES
*None.*

## NEW ISSUES
*   **Configuration Inconsistency**
    *   [#49](https://github.com/elizaos-plugins/plugin-discord/issues/49): An issue was identified where `voice.ts` bypasses `discordSettings.autoReply` by reading `DISCORD_AUTO_REPLY` directly from `runtime.getSetting`, creating a discrepancy with the text path in `messages.ts`.

## ACTIVE ISSUES
*None.*
